thought.text: 我会先运行 Task3 基线，随后集中实现缺失语义。

task_list.title: Inspect task3 IR generation framework
task_list.notes: EmitIR is skeletal; Json2Asg supplies typed ASG from clang JSON including casts/control flow/arrays.

task_list.title: Run baseline task3 score
task_list.notes: Build and evaluate current pass rate; inspect representative output compile/runtime failures.

task_list.title: Implement missing IR generation semantics
task_list.notes: Patch EmitIR for variables, expressions, control flow, arrays, function calls, globals as needed.

task_list.title: Verify task3 score and iterate
task_list.notes: Run task3-score repeatedly until full score or best achievable within budget.

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Inspect task3 IR generation framework", "status": "done", "notes": "EmitIR is skeletal; Json2Asg supplies typed ASG from clang JSON including casts/control flow/arrays."}, {"title": "Run baseline task3 score", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Build and evaluate current pass rate; inspect representative output compile/runtime failures."}, {"title": "Implement missing IR generation semantics", "status": "todo", "notes": "Patch EmitIR for variables, expressions, control flow, arrays, function calls, globals as needed."}, {"title": "Verify task3 score and iterate", "status": "todo", "notes": "Run task3-score repeatedly until full score or best achievable within budget."}], "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Update task3 inspection progress"}
